Bookmark.title: Bookmark
Bookmark.description: A saved web link with metadata.

url.description: The URL of the saved link.

description.description: A brief description of the webpage.

domain.description: The domain name of the URL.

createdAt.description: The date and time the bookmark was created.

isFavorite.description: Whether the bookmark is marked as a favorite.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the bookmark.

tags.description: An array of tags for categorization.

/users/{userId}/bookmarks/{bookmarkId}.description: Bookmarks owned by a specific user.
